text.value: Constraint failed: ipa-pat-3: 'To be usable for a wide range of internationally available applications, the Patient.name.text SHOULD be present.' (defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ipa/StructureDefinition/ipa-patient) (Best Practice Recommendation)

UCUM Codes that contain human readable annotations like {score} can be misleading (e.g. they are ignored when comparing units). Best Practice is not to depend on annotations in the UCUM code, so this usage should be checked, and the Quantity.unit SHOULD contain the annotation

UCUM Codes that contain human readable annotations like {score} can be misleading (e.g. they are ignored when comparing units). Best Practice is not to depend on annotations in the UCUM code, so this usage should be checked, and the Quantity.unit SHOULD contain the annotation

UCUM Codes that contain human readable annotations like {score} can be misleading (e.g. they are ignored when comparing units). Best Practice is not to depend on annotations in the UCUM code, so this usage should be checked, and the Quantity.unit SHOULD contain the annotation

Value sets published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableValueSet profile, which says that the element ValueSet.name should be present, but it is not
